name: makelaar-funda-tool
description: Webfuse extension that adds two custom MCP tools for funda.nl: getListProperties (searches a postcode + price range and reports how many homes were found, with the first page of results) and getPropertySummary (opens one listing and returns its description, key features and images).

tools.name: getListProperties
tools.description: Searches funda.nl (the Dutch property portal) for homes for sale in a given postal-code area within a price range, and returns how many listings were found plus the first page of results (address, price, listing URL and a thumbnail). Self-contained: if the matching funda search page isn't open, it returns {status:"navigate_required", navigateTo} — open that URL with the navigate tool, then call this again.

postal_code.description: Dutch postal code or area to search, e.g. '1019' or 'amsterdam'. A 4-digit postcode works best.

price_min.description: Minimum asking price in euros, e.g. 400000.

price_max.description: Maximum asking price in euros, e.g. 500000.

max_results.description: Maximum number of listings to return from the first page (default 12).

tools.name: getPropertySummary
tools.description: Opens a single funda.nl listing by its URL and returns the raw material for a summary: address, asking price, the full listing description, a list of key features, and image URLs. Self-contained: if that listing isn't the open page, it returns {status:"navigate_required", navigateTo} — open that URL with the navigate tool, then call this again.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is returned as the final automation result.
